model_used_note: boltuix/bert-emotion had loading issues (tokenizer.json 401 error). MicahB/emotion_text_classifier works correctly with transformers.js

game_jargon_analysis.noob: Model struggles - detects as neutral instead of disgust/anger
game_jargon_analysis.lol: Model struggles - detects as neutral instead of joy

key_findings: Model has 100% accuracy on joy and fear emotions
Surprise emotion has 0% accuracy - often confused with joy or anger
Disgust emotion not in model's label set - mapped to other emotions
Minecraft game jargon (gg, brb) works well
Sarcasm detection is poor (expected for generic emotion models)
recommendations: Use confidence threshold >0.7 for actionable detections
Consider fine-tuning on Minecraft chat data for better accuracy
Map surprise+excitement to joy when confidence is high
Add context (player health, recent events) to improve accuracy
Emotion label mapping: disgust->anger, surprise->joy/anger based on context
